body_preview: - Trajectory graph pressure #2: `state_run_incomplete_count=1` with lifecycle causes `state_unmatched/open_after_FailureObserved=3` — runs that emitted FailureObserved but never emitted RunCompleted, leaving their lifecycle book permanently open. - Assessment: structured state snapshot confirms `open_after_FailureObserved=3` from the trajectory extractor (ag
expected_evidence: Future structured state snapshots show lower `state_run_incomplete_count` and `deepseek_model_call_incomplete_count`. `state why last-failure` correctly surfaces failure evidence from runs that previously had open lifecycles. title: Close yyds state and model lifecycle gaps
